revision.comment: [[WP:POSTMOVE]] cleanup

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buddhist_temples_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buddhist_temples_in_Japan for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox | name = Buddhist temples in Japan | title = [[:en:Buddhist temples in Japan|Buddhist temples in Japan]] | state = {{{state|<includeonly>autocollapse</includeonly><noinclude>expanded [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | titlestyle = background:#FF9933; | basestyle = background:#FCC200; | selected = {{{1|}}}
| abbr1 = movement | group1 = [[:en:Japanese Buddhist architecture|Japanese Buddhist architecture]] | list1 = {{Navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = background:#FFDB58;
| group1 = Architectonic elements | list1 = * [[:en:Hidden roof|Hidden roof]] * [[:en:Hisashi (architecture)|hisashi]] * [[:en:East Asian hip-and-gable roof|irimoya]] * kaerumata: see [[:en:Nakazonae|Nakazonae]] * [[:en:Kairō|Kairō]] * [[:en:Karahafu|Karahafu]] * [[:en:Japanese dry garden|karesansui]] * kentozuka: see [[:en:Nakazonae|Nakazonae]] * [[:en:Komainu|Komainu]] * [[katōmado]] * [[:en:Mokoshi|Mokoshi]] * [[:en:Omoya|moya]] * [[:en:Nakazonae|Nakazonae]] * [[:en:Nio (Buddhism)|Niō or Kongōrikishi]] * [[:en:Sandō|Sandō]] * [[shichidō garan]] * [[shōrō]] * [[:en:Sōrin|Sōrin]] * [[:en:Tokyō|Tokyō]] * [[:en:Stone lantern|Stone lantern]] * [[:en:Onigawara|Onigawara]]
| group2 = ''[[Mon (architecture)|Mon (gates)]]'' | list2 = * [[karamon]] * [[:en:Nijūmon|Nijūmon]] * [[:en:Niōmon|Niōmon]] * [[:en:Rōmon|Rōmon]] * [[sanmon]] * [[:en:Sōmon|Sōmon]] * [[torii]]
| group3 = Buildings | list3 = * [[:en:Chinjusha|Chinjusha]] * [[:en:Chōzuya|chōzuya/temizuya]] * [[Dō (architecture)|-dō]] * [[:en:Main Hall (Japanese Buddhism)|main hall (''kon-dō'', ''hon-dō'', ''butsuden'')]] * [[Kuri (kitchen)|kuri]] * [[kyōzō|kyōzō or kyō-dō]] * [[:en:Shoin|Shoin]]
| group4 = [[Japanese pagoda]]s | list4 = * [[gorintō]] * [[:en:Hōkyōintō|Hōkyōintō]] * [[Japanese pagoda|hōtō]] * [[Japanese pagoda|Kasatōba]] * [[Japanese pagoda|Sotōba]] * [[Japanese pagoda|Muhōtō]] * [[tahōtō]]
| group5 = Styles | list5 = * [[Daibutsuyō]] * [[:en:Wayō|Wayō]] * [[Setchūyō]] * [[:en:Shoin-zukuri|Shoin-zukuri]] * [[:en:Wayō|Shin-Wayō]] * [[:en:Zenshūyō|Zenshūyō]] * [[:en:Ōbaku Zen architecture|Ōbaku Zen architecture]]
| group6 = Others | list6 = * [[Om|A-un]] * [[:en:Ken (unit)|ken]] }}
| group2 = [[:en:Buddhism in Japan|Schools and objects of worship]] | list2 = {{Navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = background:#FFDB58;
| group1 = Major schools | list1 = * [[Jōdo-shū|Jōdo]] * [[:en:Nichiren Buddhism|Nichiren]] * [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon]] * [[:en:Tendai|Tendai]]
| group2 = [[:en:Zen|Zen]] schools | list2 = * [[Sōtō]] * [[:en:Ōbaku|Ōbaku]] * [[:en:Rinzai school|Rinzai]]
| group3 = [[Nanto Rokushū#Asuka and Nara Periods|Nanto rokushū]] | list3 = * [[:en:Tattvasiddhi|Jōjitsu]] * [[:en:East Asian Yogācāra|Hossō]] * [[Kusha-shū|Kusha]] * [[:en:Kegon|Kegon]] * [[Risshū (Buddhism)|Ritsu]] * [[:en:East Asian Mādhyamaka|Sanron]]
| group4 = [[Gohonzon|Objects of worship]] | list4 = * [[Amitābha|Amida Nyōrai]] * [[Benzaiten]] * [[:en:Vairocana|Dainichi Nyorai]] * [[:en:Kṣitigarbha|Jizō]] * [[Kannon|Kannon]] * [[:en:Marici (Buddhism)|Marishi-ten]] * [[:en:Gautama Buddha|Shaka Nyorai]] * [[Four Heavenly Kings|Shitennō (Four Kings)]] * [[Twelve Heavenly Generals|Twelve Heavenly Generals (Jūni Shinshō)]] * [[:en:Bhaisajyaguru|Yakushi Nyorai]] }}
| group3 = Other elements | list3 = {{Navbox|subgroup | groupstyle = background:#FFDB58;
| group1 = Implements | list1 = * [[kei (ritual gong)]] * [[Wooden fish|mokugyō]]
| group2 = Others | list2 = * [[:en:Buddha footprint|bussokuseki]] * [[:en:Butsudan|Butsudan]] * [[Glossary of Japanese Buddhism]] * [[Japanese Buddhist pantheon]] * [[:en:Jingū-ji|Jingū-ji]] * [[:en:Jingū-ji|miyadera]] * [[:en:Saisen|saisenbako]] }} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
